terms_1_body: By accessing and using {{name}} you agree to comply with these Terms and Conditions. If you disagree with any of them, please do not use the site.
terms_2_body: You agree to use the site in good faith, without unlawful purposes and without affecting its availability, security or integrity. We may suspend accounts that violate these rules.
terms_3_body: You are responsible for the information you provide when creating your account and for keeping your password secure. Notify us immediately if you detect unauthorized use.
terms_4_body: We strive to keep product information, prices and inventory up to date, but may correct errors at any time. Prices include applicable taxes and are subject to change without notice.
terms_5_body: Order confirmation does not guarantee acceptance; we may reject it for reasons such as availability, pricing errors or fraud suspicion. Payments are processed through authorized providers.
terms_6_body: Delivery times are estimates and may vary due to logistical factors. Shipping costs are shown before order confirmation.
terms_7_body: You may request returns within the applicable legal period and under the conditions published on the site. Refunds are made through the same payment method used for the purchase.
terms_8_body: All content, trademarks, logos and images on the site are the property of {{name}} or their respective owners and are protected by applicable laws. Reproduction without authorization is prohibited.
terms_9_body: To the extent permitted by law, {{name}} is not responsible for indirect damages, lost profits or losses arising from use of the site.
terms_10_body: We may update these terms occasionally. The current version will always be available on this page with the last update date.
terms_11_body: These terms are governed by the laws in force in the country where {{name}} operates. Any dispute shall be resolved by the competent courts of that jurisdiction.
terms_12_body: If you have questions about these terms, write to us at
privacy_1_body: At {{name}} we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting the personal data you share with us. This policy describes what information we collect, how we use it and the rights you have over your data.
privacy_2_intro: We may collect the following types of information:
privacy_2_item_2: Shipping and billing data: address, city, country.
privacy_2_item_3: Payment data: processed securely by our payment providers.
privacy_2_item_4: Browsing data: IP address, device type, pages visited.
privacy_3_item_2: Communicate with you about your account or purchases.
privacy_3_item_3: Improve our products and user experience.
privacy_3_item_4: Send promotions when you have given us your consent.
privacy_3_item_5: Comply with legal obligations and prevent fraud.
privacy_4_body: We do not sell your personal information. We only share data with service providers that help us operate (payment processors, logistics, email) and under confidentiality agreements.
privacy_5_body: We use cookies and similar technologies to maintain your session, remember your preferences and analyze site usage. You can manage cookies from your browser settings.
privacy_6_body: You may request access, rectification or deletion of your personal data, as well as object to its processing. To exercise these rights, contact us at the email below.
privacy_7_body: We implement reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your data against unauthorized access, loss or alteration.
privacy_8_body: We may update this policy occasionally. We will publish the current version on this page indicating the date of last update.
privacy_9_body: If you have questions about this policy, write to us at
